title: Upscale masterclass sessions: planning the next Eras Tour with monday.com

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
We hosted our masterclass sessions in London and New York, with a fun little twist: Planning the next Eras Tour with monday.com—are you ready for it…?

Yes, we went full T-Swift on this one!

Our sessions were all about transforming a blank space into the event-planning monday.com board of your wildest dreams. It was less about the stress and more about shaking it off with automation tips, custom workflows, and clever ways to manage social media and data feedback.

Inspired by Taylor Swift Eras Tour-levels of complexity, attendees learned how to set up workflows from scratch and harness our apps to manage multiple moving parts—from automating repetitive tasks to simplifying scheduling and team communication.

We aimed to make the sessions not just informative, not even just actionable, but also, fun!

If you couldn’t make it to the live sessions, we missed you—but ‘speak now’, and we can still help you get more from monday.com. Just get in touch with us here and we can organise a customised masterclass for you and your team. Whether you’re gearing up for a solo project or bringing the whole team along for the ride, we’re here to make it a success.

We can’t wait to help you take your next project to centre stage
